title: Tchuukthese
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Tchuukthese''',<ref name="POTJS">''[[Power of the Jedi Sourcebook]]''</ref> also known as '''Tchuukthai''',<ref name="EGPM">''[[The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons]]''</ref> was the guttural native [[Language/Legends|language]] of the [[Tchuukthai]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. Most Tchuukthai were fluent in both Tchuukthese and [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]], although they were only literate in their own language.<ref name="UAAWE">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20030410uaaweb|text=''Ultimate Alien Anthology'' Web Enhancement}}</ref>

{{Language-stub}}

==Known words==
*''Natth'' — "cage"<ref name="TOTJC">''[[Tales of the Jedi Companion]]''</ref>

==Notable non-native speakers of Tchuukthese==
*[[Meetra Surik]]<ref name="KOTORCG">''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]''</ref>
*[[Odan-Urr/Legends|Odan-Urr]]<ref name="POTJS" />

*[[Oss Wilum]]<ref name="POTJS" />
*[[Vodo-Siosk Baas]]<ref name="POTJS" />
